description: You are a paralegal at a technology law firm. A draft of a SaaS Terms of Service agreement for CloudScale Analytics is located at /home/ga/Documents/saas_terms_of_service.odt. Your task is to format this document into a professional legal contract according to the instructions in /home/ga/Desktop/legal_formatting_instructions.txt. To satisfy legal requirements for conspicuousness, convert the body text of Section 8 (WARRANTY DISCLAIMER) and Section 9 (LIMITATION OF LIABILITY) to ALL CAPS. Additionally, convert the pricing data in Exhibit A into a table and format the headings and body text as specified. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/saas_terms_of_service.odt.

metadata.warranty_text: The services and all related components and information are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without any warranties
metadata.liability_text: In no event shall CloudScale Analytics, its affiliates, or their respective officers, directors, employees
body_samples: By accessing or using the CloudScale Analytics service
Users must provide accurate registration information
All rights, title, and interest in and to the service
These Terms remain in effect until terminated
